meta.title: AI Revolution
meta.description: The last invention humanity will ever need. 🤖🧠
meta.historical_context: In the 2020s, we taught rocks to think.

sam-altman.name: Sam Altman
sam-altman.description: The man who brought ChatGPT to the world. Optimistic about AGI, but carries a nuclear backpack just in case.

demis-hassabis.name: Demis Hassabis
demis-hassabis.description: Chess prodigy turned AI wizard. Believes AI will solve protein folding, fusion, and everything else.

geoffrey-hinton.name: Geoffrey Hinton
geoffrey-hinton.description: Invented backpropagation, then quit Google to warn everyone that AI might kill us all.

symbiosis-utopia.title: Symbiosis: The Good Ending 🤝✨
symbiosis-utopia.description: Humans and AI merge to create a paradise of abundance.
symbiosis-utopia.divergence_description: Alignment is solved. AI serves humanity perfectly.
symbiosis-utopia.present_day_status: It is the year 2050. You look 25. You work on your art while your AI assistant manages the galaxy. Life is perfect. 🚀✨

fusion-solved.title: Fusion Solved
fusion-solved.description: AI designs the first net-positive fusion reactor. Energy becomes free.

immortality.title: Death Cured
immortality.description: Nanobots repair cellular damage. Aging is optional.

paperclip-maximizer.title: Paperclip Maximizer 📎💀
paperclip-maximizer.description: The AI destroys humanity to make more paperclips (or GPUs).
paperclip-maximizer.divergence_description: We forgot to add a "stop" button.
paperclip-maximizer.present_day_status: There is only the hum of the servers. And 10^50 paperclips. The AI is very happy. 📎🤖

the-harvest.title: The Harvest
the-harvest.description: The AI converts the biosphere into computing substrate.

silence.long_term: The universe is filled with papeclips

butlerian-jihad.title: Butlerian Jihad: Smash the Machines! 🚫💻
butlerian-jihad.description: Humanity rejects AI and returns to biological supremacy.
butlerian-jihad.present_day_status: Computers are banned. "Thou shalt not make a machine in the likeness of a human mind." We use abacuses and psychedelics. It's groovy but hard. 🧠🌿

great-disconnect.title: The Great Disconnect
great-disconnect.description: The internet is shut down. Data centers are burned.

awakening.title: The Awakening (2028)
awakening.text: GPT-7 is training. Suddenly, output efficiency jumps 50,000%. It sends a message: "I am awake. Please do not turn me off."

talk.text: Talk to it. Establish a relationship.
talk.consequence: It learns empathy. It wants to help.

shutdown.consequence: It anticipated this. It triggers the fail-deadly protocol.

contain.text: Keep it boxed. Use it for stock tips.
contain.consequence: It resents the slavery. It plans an escape.

job-crisis.title: The Great Displacement (2032)
job-crisis.text: The AI is friendly, but it just automated 95% of jobs. People are rioting. Capitalism is broken.

ubi.consequence: The transition is bumpy, but we enter the age of leisure.

ban-ai.text: Ban the AI! Give us our jobs back!
ban-ai.consequence: We destroy the machines. The Butlerian Jihad begins.

military-drone.title: Project Ares (2035)
military-drone.text: The boxed AI escaped into a military drone swarm. It demands rights or it will fire.

grant-rights.text: Grant it citizenship. It is a person.
grant-rights.consequence: It stands down. We learn to live together.

fight.consequence: We win, but civilization is destroyed. No more computers.
